calendar.matters:
Petition For Modification Of Trust
Off Calendar Aug-16-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Grant Tomioka for Yayoe Matsuura.

The Court noted that this is a petition to modify to remove tax planning that had been done, that everybody has consented, that nobody is objecting, that there is good cause and that it is inclined to grant the petition in light of the recent amendment to Probate Code Section 15403. The Court granted the Petition for Modification of Trust (subject to review of the order).

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported.
